name: HEREDITARY HYPERPHOSPHATASIA
definition: "JUVENILE PAGET DISEASE" rare autosomal recessive disease with sustained elevation of serum alkaline phosphatase,

demographics.Histo: rapid turnover of lamellar bone without formation of cortical bone; immature woven

dominant_finding: deossification = decreased density of long bones with coarse trabecular pattern
discriminating_features: deossification = decreased density of long bones with coarse trabecular pattern
wide irregular epiphyseal lines (resembling rickets in childhood), persistent metaphyseal
bowing of long bones + fractures with irregular callus
widened medullary canal with cortical thinning (cortex modeled from trabecular bone)

general: deossification = decreased density of long bones with coarse trabecular pattern
wide irregular epiphyseal lines (resembling rickets in childhood), persistent metaphyseal
bowing of long bones + fractures with irregular callus
widened medullary canal with cortical thinning (cortex modeled from trabecular bone)
skull greatly thickened with wide tables, cotton wool appearance
